title: FleurDeLys SMP
description: The official modpack of the semi-public FleurDeLys server
body:
# **Official FleurDeLys SMP Modpack**

It is to be used on the semi-public server, _FleurDeLys_, which is a francophone and friendly minecraft/discord community.

This latest version of the SMP (V0.5) comes with a twist, the Pokemon world merges in to Minecraft !

Adventure with your friends on this Cobbleverse based modpack and fend off Pokemon foes !
